src: Codex Autoresearch Skill — A self-directed iterative system for Codex that continuously cycles through: modify, verify, retain or discard, and repeat indefinitely. Inspired by Karpathy’s autoresearch concept.
ja: Codex Autoresearch Skill — 修正→検証→採用または破棄のサイクルを無限に繰り返すCodex向けの自律的な反復システム。Karpathyのautoresearchコンセプトにインスパイアされた
